Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Correlative comparative clause; parallel nominal construction without explicit verb (elliptical moral aphorism).
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: One must face the consequences of one’s actions; actions determine outcomes.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: तूं जें करता, ताचें परिणाम तुज्याक भोगपाक लागतलें.
Usage Contexts: Daily speech, family advice, moral instruction, politics.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Shared Indo-Aryan karmic philosophy reflected in agrarian Konkani society.
First Example Sentence: तूं लोकांक फसयल्यार जशी करणी तशी भरणी हांव सांगता.
Second Example Sentence: गांवांत सगळे म्हणटात, जशी करणी तशी भरणी विसरूं नको.
Third Example Sentence: राजकारण्यांक जशी करणी तशी भरणी लागू जावंक जाय.

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Negative declarative clause with instrumental phrase; metaphorical impossibility structure.
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Conflict or cooperation requires at least two parties; one side alone is not responsible.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Derived from everyday embodied action metaphor common in South Asian oral culture.
First Example Sentence: तूं एकल्यान दोष देवू नको, एक हातान टाळी वाजता ना.
Second Example Sentence: शिक्षक म्हणाले, एक हातान टाळी वाजता ना, विद्यार्थ्यांनीही प्रयत्न करपाक जाय.
Third Example Sentence: घरांत कलह जाल्यार एक हातान टाळी वाजता ना हें लक्षांत धरा.

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Serial participial construction with result clause; habitual present.
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Small efforts accumulate into significant results over time.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Agrarian and monsoon-based imagery central to coastal Konkani life.
First Example Sentence: दररोज थोडो अभ्यास कर, थेंब थेंब साचून तळो भरता.
Second Example Sentence: आई मुलाक सांगता, थेंब थेंब साचून तळो भरता म्हणतात.
Third Example Sentence: व्यापारांत थोडी बचत करपाक लागता, थेंब थेंब साचून तळो भरता.

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Imperative negative clause with locative metaphor.
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Do not build plans on unstable or unrealistic foundations.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Coastal storm imagery reflecting vulnerability of traditional homes.
First Example Sentence: फक्त अफवांवर निर्णय घेऊ नको, वाऱ्यावर घर बांधू नका.
Second Example Sentence: तो म्हणटा, वाऱ्यावर घर बांधू नका, आधी खात्री कर.
Third Example Sentence: गुंतवणूक करतांना वाऱ्यावर घर बांधू नका हें लक्षांत ठेव.

Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: बाहेरून दिसतं तें खरं नसूं शकता.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Common moral caution across Konkani folklore narratives.
First Example Sentence: तो बरो दिसता, पण दिसता तसं नसता.
Second Example Sentence: ही गोष्ट सोपी दिसता, दिसता तसं नसता.

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Past passive metaphorical clause; agentive instrumental marking.
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Giving responsibility or advantage to someone incapable of handling it.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Traditional metaphor from temple and oil-lamp culture.
First Example Sentence: त्याक मोठो प्रकल्प दिलो म्हणजे आंधळ्यान हातीन दीप दिलो.
Second Example Sentence: लोक म्हणटात, आंधळ्यान हातीन दीप दिलो ह्या निर्णयांत.
Third Example Sentence: अनुभव नसतांना काम दिल्यार आंधळ्यान हातीन दीप दिलो.

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Do not create unnecessary trouble or stir conflict.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Fishing and water imagery common in coastal Konkani communities.
First Example Sentence: सगळें शांत आसा, उगाचें पाणी ढवळू नका.
Second Example Sentence: राजकारणांत उगाचें पाणी ढवळू नका म्हणतात.
Third Example Sentence: तूं जुनी गोष्ट काढून उगाचें पाणी ढवळू नको.

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Simile using -सारको comparative form; copular clause.
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Life is vast and unpredictable like the sea.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Deeply tied to Goa’s maritime history and seafaring culture.
First Example Sentence: बाब म्हणाले, सोंसार समुद्रासारको आसा, धीर धर.
Third Example Sentence: जीवनाच्या संकटांत सोंसार समुद्रासारको आसा हें जाणवतं.

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Conditional subordinate clause with negated habitual main clause.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Time-conscious agrarian scheduling tied to monsoon cycles.
First Example Sentence: अभ्यास कर, वेळ गेल्यार परत येता ना.
Second Example Sentence: आई म्हणता, वेळ गेल्यार परत येता ना म्हणून मेहनत कर.
Third Example Sentence: तरुणपणांत संधी सोडू नको, वेळ गेल्यार परत येता ना.

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: A rare opportunity or great fortune has been obtained.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Gold symbolism in Goan trade and dowry traditions.
First Example Sentence: तूं ही नोकरी मेळ्ळी म्हणजे हातांतों सोनें मेळ्ळें.
Second Example Sentence: गुंतवणुकींत फायदा जाला, हातांतों सोनें मेळ्ळें म्हणतात.
Third Example Sentence: त्याका अशी संधी मेळ्ळी की हातांतों सोनें मेळ्ळें.
